MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Footfall_DMO__dlm.location_name__c AS location_name__c, Footfall_DMO__dlm.city__c AS city__c, MAX(Footfall_DMO__dlm.footfall_daily_avg__c) / MAX(Footfall_DMO__dlm.footfall_max_regional__c) * 50 + MAX(Demographic_DMO__dlm.annual_growth_rate_pct__c) * 0.3 - MIN(Competitor_DMO__dlm.distance_to_nearest_site_m__c) / MAX(Competitor_DMO__dlm.max_regional_competitors__c) / 500 * 20 AS demand_score__c, MIN(Competitor_DMO__dlm.distance_to_nearest_site_m__c) AS nearest_competitor_dist_m__c, MAX(Demographic_DMO__dlm.annual_growth_rate_pct__c) AS demo_growth_rate__c, MAX(Footfall_DMO__dlm.footfall_daily_avg__c) / MAX(Footfall_DMO__dlm.footfall_max_regional__c) AS footfall_index_norm__c FROM Footfall_DMO__dlm INNER JOIN Demographic_DMO__dlm ON Footfall_DMO__dlm.location_name__c = Demographic_DMO__dlm.location_name__c INNER JOIN Competitor_DMO__dlm ON Footfall_DMO__dlm.city__c = Competitor_DMO__dlm.city__c GROUP BY Footfall_DMO__dlm.location_name__c, Footfall_DMO__dlm.city__c
